chunks.text:
INTRODUCTION
Course overview and guiding questions.

SECTION 1 - DEFINING HEALTH AND WELLNESS
Definitions and outcomes.

Dimensions of Health and Wellness
The dimensions are interdependent and constantly interact with each other.

PHYSICAL
Move effectively, sleep well, and care for your body.
INTELLECTUAL
Stay curious and keep learning.
SOCIAL
Build healthy relationships and communicate with respect.

SPIRITUAL
Connect your values to your daily actions.
EMOTIONAL
Recognize, understand, and express feelings constructively.

What Determines Health?
The Public Health Agency of Canada identifies twelve key determinants of health.
KEY DETERMINANT - 1. Income and Social Status
KEY DETERMINANT - 2. Social Support Networks
KEY DETERMINANT - 3. Education and Literacy

KEY DETERMINANT - 4. Employment/Working Conditions
KEY DETERMINANT - 5. Social Environments
KEY DETERMINANT - 6. Physical Environments
